name: Telecommunications 5G Core Infiltration
description: Attack tree modelling compromise of a telecommunications 5G core network targeting subscriber data, lawful intercept systems, and network slicing via SS7/Diameter/HTTP2 protocols
root_objective: Infiltrate 5G core network to intercept communications, steal subscriber data, or disrupt services

nodes.title: Infiltrate 5G Telecommunications Core
nodes.description: Compromise the 5G core network to intercept subscriber communications, steal data, manipulate network slices, or disrupt mobile services

nodes.title: Exploit SS7/Diameter Interconnect
nodes.description: Abuse legacy signalling protocols at the interconnect boundary between operators

nodes.title: Send SS7 Location Tracking Queries
nodes.description: Issue SS7 ATI/PSI messages from a compromised roaming partner to track subscriber location in real time

nodes.title: Intercept SMS via SS7 Redirect
nodes.description: Redirect incoming SMS (including 2FA codes) to an attacker-controlled number via SS7 UpdateLocation

nodes.title: Compromise 5G Service-Based Architecture
nodes.description: Attack the cloud-native 5G core network functions communicating via HTTP/2 and REST APIs

nodes.title: Exploit NRF API Vulnerabilities
nodes.description: Attack the Network Repository Function to discover and access all network function endpoints

nodes.title: Compromise Subscriber Data (UDM/UDR)
nodes.description: Access the Unified Data Management to read/modify subscriber profiles, authentication vectors, and slice access

nodes.title: Attack Network Slicing
nodes.description: Exploit network slice isolation failures to cross slice boundaries

nodes.title: Break Slice Isolation
nodes.description: Exploit misconfigured or vulnerable slice orchestration to access a higher-security network slice (e.g., emergency services)

nodes.title: Exhaust Slice Resources
nodes.description: Consume resources within a critical network slice to cause denial of service for other slice tenants

nodes.title: Compromise Lawful Intercept System
nodes.description: Access the LI/CALEA system to conduct unauthorised surveillance or disable legitimate intercepts

nodes.title: Access LI Mediation Gateway
nodes.description: Compromise the LI mediation system to add unauthorised intercept targets or access existing intercept data

nodes.title: Exploit ETSI LI Interface
nodes.description: Attack the ETSI LI handover interfaces (HI1/HI2/HI3) between the operator and LEA to intercept warrant data
